---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for this repository
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### 🎯 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you would like to propose.

### 📋 Checklist
Provide a list of deliverables or tasks required to complete this feature.
- [ ] Implement core logic
- [ ] Add visual styles
- [ ] Verify responsiveness

### 💡 Rationale
Why is this feature useful? How does it benefit developers or users visiting the Vault?
